title: Production Runtime & Infrastructure Hardening Pack
decision_rationale: GL-220 adds conservative runtime/infrastructure documentation, a machine-readable artifact, a local-only dry-run/plan gate, and focused tests. It does not implement real production deployment, cloud integration, TLS termination, external monitoring, production secret rollout, package publishing, migrations, or production SaaS readiness.

current_runtime_infrastructure_state_sum.runtime_model: Local Python HTTP service using ThreadingHTTPServer.
current_runtime_infrastructure_state_sum.persistence: SQLite default; PostgreSQL optional and not production-ready.
implemented_baselines: health and readiness endpoints with safe minimal output
in-process auth and API rate limits
structured safe logging and correlation ID propagation
production-like startup checks for unsafe local/demo configuration
fail-closed checks for unsupported external identity configuration

production_runtime_infrastructure_gap_as.tls_reverse_proxy: No real TLS termination, certificate lifecycle, HSTS, trusted proxy policy, or live hostname model.
production_runtime_infrastructure_gap_as.container_runtime: No production non-root/read-only/capability/seccomp policy, image provenance gate, registry control, or orchestration runtime policy.
production_runtime_infrastructure_gap_as.process_service: ThreadingHTTPServer direct start remains a Developer Preview model; no supervisor, graceful drain, worker sizing, restart policy, or resource quotas.
production_runtime_infrastructure_gap_as.runtime_secrets: Env-based config exists; no managed secret store, KMS/HSM integration, rotation automation, or lease lifecycle.
production_runtime_infrastructure_gap_as.request_limits: Body and in-process rate limits exist; no production timeout, slow-client, concurrency, queue, backpressure, or edge rate-limit model.
production_runtime_infrastructure_gap_as.network_exposure: Localhost default and demo endpoint public exposure guard exist; no production ingress, egress, firewall, allowlist, or segmentation model.
production_runtime_infrastructure_gap_as.observability: Structured logs and correlation IDs exist; no external metrics, tracing, alerting, pager, SIEM/SOC, or SLO stack.
production_runtime_infrastructure_gap_as.backup_dr: Synthetic drills and plan scripts exist; no scheduled production backup, restore RTO/RPO evidence, failover, PITR, or DR runtime integration.
production_runtime_infrastructure_gap_as.postgres: Optional support and ephemeral validation history exist; no production topology, pooling validation, permissions, failover, or production readiness.
production_runtime_infrastructure_gap_as.release_recovery: Documentation baseline only; no deploy rings, rollback automation, artifact provenance, or emergency runtime recovery procedure.

implemented_hardening_summary: Added scripts/ops/gl220_runtime_infrastructure_gate.py as a local-only dry-run/plan runtime infrastructure gate.

tls_https_reverse_proxy_posture.current_state: No in-app TLS termination and no production reverse proxy rollout.

container_runtime_hardening_posture.current_state: Local Docker artifacts are not a production hardening model.

runtime_environment_secret_handling_post.current_state: Environment-variable configuration with safe startup checks and redaction posture.

implemented: missing admin-token enforcement fails closed in production-like modes
missing or placeholder admin token fails closed in production-like modes
disabled challenge enforcement fails closed in production-like modes
enabled demo endpoints fail closed in production-like modes
unsafe bootstrap operator token fails closed in production-like modes
unsupported OAuth/OIDC/JWT configuration fails closed in production-like modes
malformed, empty, and oversized JSON rejection
in-process auth and API rate limits

rate_limit_runtime_abuse_posture.current_state: GL-208 baseline with in-process limits, safe logging, and correlation signals.

network_exposure_ingress_posture.current_state: Local loopback default and demo endpoint public exposure guard.

health_readiness_runtime_posture.current_state: Public /health and /readiness return safe minimal status without raw env, secrets, tokens, or tenant data.

external_monitoring_alerting_requirement: availability, latency, error-rate, auth-denial, rate-limit, database, migration, backup, restore, and audit-chain signals
synthetic checks using synthetic/demo data only until real-data gates change
incident correlation across API, database, backup, and identity layers

backup_restore_dr_runtime_integration_po.current_state: GL-205 and GL-216 provide synthetic drills and planning artifacts.
remaining_gaps: PITR or approved alternative for PostgreSQL
schema migration rollout and rollback procedure

identity_access_runtime_dependency_postu.current_state: GL-219 fail-closed external identity config checks; controlled-preview bearer-token model.

tenant_workspace_runtime_enforcement_pos.current_state: GL-215 hardened selected tenant-visible routes; tenant context is server-derived.

production_readiness_impact.summary: Runtime/infrastructure ambiguity is reduced through documentation, artifact, gate, and tests.

controlled_preview_impact.summary: Improves reviewer clarity for strict-boundary controlled preview with synthetic/demo data only.

remaining_runtime_infrastructure_blocker: No real TLS termination, certificate lifecycle, HSTS, reverse proxy trust boundary, or live external hostname model.
No production container hardening policy, image provenance gate, registry control, or orchestration baseline.
No production process supervisor/service model, graceful drain, worker sizing, restart policy, or resource quota model.
No production network ingress/egress topology, firewall/allowlist model, or trusted proxy policy.
No production timeout, concurrency, backpressure, or edge rate-limit model.
No external metrics, tracing, log aggregation, alerting, pager, SIEM/SOC, or SLO ownership.
No production secret-store/KMS/HSM integration or rotation automation.
No scheduled backup automation, restore RTO/RPO evidence, failover, PITR, or DR runtime integration.
No production PostgreSQL topology, pooling, least-privilege runtime role, or live production validation.
No production identity provider, SSO/MFA, named admin lifecycle, or external JWT/OIDC validator.
Workspace enforcement, database RLS, tenant lifecycle, and adversarial multi-tenant validation remain incomplete.

risk_register.risk: Runtime container/process model is not production-grade
risk_register.mitigation: Future service model and container hardening gate

risk_register.risk: Network exposure could be misconfigured outside local preview
risk_register.mitigation: Keep public deployment NO-GO; require ingress design before production

risk_register.risk: External observability and alerting are absent
Backup/restore/DR is not automated or production-tested

risk_register.mitigation: Future managed secrets and rotation gate

findings: Runtime/infrastructure posture is clearer and locally checkable after GL-220.
Production infrastructure readiness remains blocked by TLS/proxy, container/runtime, process, network, observability, backup/DR, PostgreSQL, identity, and tenant/workspace gaps.
No real production deployment or credential-bearing integration was added.
recommended_next_issues: GL-221 Workspace Enforcement & Final Go/No-Go v6
Future TLS/reverse proxy and network ingress hardening gate
Future container/process supervisor and runtime resource limit gate
Future external observability/alerting and incident integration gate
